claim_levels.name: No scientific claim beyond code execution.
The system cleanly imports external evidence and blocks leakage.
The system classifies folding-problem grammar from non-coordinate evidence.
The system generates falsifiable, perturbation-sensitive operator-level mechanism predictions supported by independent non-coordinate holdouts.
The system generalizes prospectively to unseen targets under masking, decoy pressure, source separation, and independent holdout validation.
The system can predict de novo 3D folds / functional conformational ensembles across broad protein classes with independent blind validation comparable to structure-prediction benchmarks.
